creator: ebay@looksharp.net
text:
On Mon, Oct 07, 2013 at 11:50:00PM +0000, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:

  Thank you very much for your problem report.
  It has the internal identification `ports/182816'.


Followup: It also works if I install lang/gcc instead of lang/gcc46.
My mind just jumped to lang/gcc46 because I'm used to thinking about
the individual versions.

I found a record of what autoremove removed in the past:

# pkg autoremove
Deinstallation has been requested for the following 12 packages:

        bitstream-vera-1.10_5
        gcc-4.6.3
        binutils-2.23.2
        gcc-ecj-4.5
        gio-fam-backend-2.34.3
        gamin-0.1.10_5
        gobject-introspection-1.36.0_2
        mpc-0.9
        mpfr-3.1.2
        gmp-5.1.2
        p5-Math-Round-0.06
        p5-Package-DeprecationManager-0.13
